name: Semantic drift
description: The same logical action carries action_type 'behavioral_eval' at issuance and 'behavioral' at verification — a real vocabulary drift documented in A2A #1786. Different preimage produces different action_ref for one action. A conforming verifier MUST treat action_type as a closed vocabulary and reject on mismatch.
note: action_type MUST be drawn from a closed canonical vocabulary. Normalizing-then-matching would mask the drift and allow a verifier to silently accept a different action than was issued.
